response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates extensive software development experience and strong engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD, they critically lack the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, particularly on the Windows platform. Their exposure to capital markets or fixed income domains is also very minimal, which are both core requirements for this specialized role, making them a poor fit despite their general technical prowess.
strengths: Extensive general software development experience (10+ years)
Strong grasp of modern software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Experience with high-performance and distributed systems
concerns: Very limited and outdated C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement
Lack of specific capital markets or fixed income domain expertise
No demonstrated C++ development experience on the Windows platform
